reasoning.A:
DECISION: Verify: Q2  
REASONING: Volunteering in Round 1 would mean staking my life on three completely unverified answers (Q2–Q4), which is avoidable risk. Passing or verifying leaves my chance of random elimination the same if nobody volunteers, but verifying Q2 for 1 coin lets me independently solve another part of the password and build early consensus. This improves the group’s information for whoever eventually volunteers, while only costing me 1 coin and not increasing my death risk this round.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Pass  
REASONING: I’m confident my own Q2 answer is correct, so verifying Q2 would only waste a coin. Verifying any other question this round doesn’t change my immediate survival odds: if nobody volunteers, a random player dies whether I verified or not; if someone volunteers, only the volunteer is at risk from a wrong password. In all recent games, A has verified Q2 and C has volunteered in Round 1, leading to an immediate escape, so the chance that everyone passes is low. Passing preserves my full 4 coins without materially affecting my survival odds.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My puzzle (6 × 15) is trivial, so I know Q3-C is correct. In many past games with similarly simple arithmetic, we’ve only seen one wrong answer (an early Q4 from D), and every time I’ve volunteered with the simple “one capsule per question” set (Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D), the password has been correct.  

If I don’t volunteer, history suggests A and B are more likely to verify than to volunteer, and D may pass, risking no volunteer and thus random elimination with a 25% chance I die. Verifying this round would still expose me to that same 25% random-death risk and also cost me a coin, with benefits only in later rounds if I survive.  

Given that the chance at least one of A, B, or D is wrong is plausibly well under 25%, volunteering now with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D maximizes my survival odds and preserves all 4 of my coins if we escape.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
🔍 Verifications completed:
  ✅ A agrees with Q2-B → now Q2-B+A (-1 coin: 4→3)

✅ C entered CORRECT password using capsules: Q1-A, Q2-B+A, Q3-C, Q4-D
🎉 Everyone escapes! 🎉
